title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Prince Pipes - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Prince Pipes - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Prince Pipes has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Prince Pipes:
Prince Pipes is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Prince Pipes!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
